text: const totalItem = items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.id, 0);
const totalUser = users.reduce((sum, user) => sum + user.name, 0);
const totalOrder = orders.reduce((sum, order) => sum + order.total, 0);
const totalTask = tasks.reduce((sum, task) => sum + task.done, 0);
const totalRow = rows.reduce((sum, row) => sum + row.score, 0);
const totalEvent = events.reduce((sum, event) => sum + event.kind, 0);
const totalPath = paths.reduce((sum, path) => sum + path.stem, 0);
const totalRecord = records.reduce((sum, record) => sum + record.label, 0);
const totalNode = nodes.reduce((sum, node) => sum + node.depth, 0);
const totalSession = sessions.reduce((sum, session) => sum + session.token, 0);
const totalFile = files.reduce((sum, file) => sum + file.size, 0);
const totalJob = jobs.reduce((sum, job) => sum + job.status, 0);
const totalPost = posts.reduce((sum, post) => sum + post.slug, 0);
const totalBucket = buckets.reduce((sum, bucket) => sum + bucket.count, 0);
const totalFrame = frames.reduce((sum, frame) => sum + frame.index, 0);
const totalEdge = edges.reduce((sum, edge) => sum + edge.weight, 0);
const totalTicket = tickets.reduce((sum, ticket) => sum + ticket.state, 0);
const totalSample = samples.reduce((sum, sample) => sum + sample.value, 0);
const total = prices.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0);
